title: H_001 LPP source-power ceiling вЂ” representative LPP budget (~250 W class в†’ ~1.5 kW pushed) falls ~2 kW short of the ~3.5 kW the 6.5 nm optics demand (H_002 Г—14) requires. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” baseline 250 W, ceiling 1500 W, demand 3548 W (gap 2048 W). LPP power-scaling alone insufficient for 6.5 nm on this representative budget; engineering-horizon wall (reopenable). 5/5 PASS.

title: H_002 BEUV (6.5 nm) mirror-throughput wall вЂ” same 11-mirror column passes ~14x fewer photons at 6.5 nm (La/B R=0.55) than 13.5 nm (Mo/Si R=0.70), forcing ~14x more source power. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” power_multiplier=14.19x (T_euv=0.0198, T_beuv=0.00139; N=7в†’5.41x), 5/5 falsifiers PASS. Optics-side source wall before emitter/resist penalties.

title: H_003 NA vs depth-of-focus trade вЂ” NA 0.33в†’0.55 prints 1.67x finer but loses 2.78x focus depth; DoF penalty (NAВІ) strictly steeper than resolution gain (NAВ№). SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” res 12.27в†’7.36 nm (1.667x), DoF 61.98в†’22.31 nm (2.778x = (NA_hi/NA_lo)ВІ). Geometric root of the ultra-thin-resist wall. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_004 compact plasma-wakefield accelerator as light-source enabler вЂ” Dawson E_0=96.16 GV/m (~3200x RF) reaches 1 GeV in ~1 cm vs ~33 m. Reference-matched to demiurge cern-accelerator. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” E_0=96.15920 GV/m (|О”|=0 vs demiurge ref), gradient 3205x RF, length 3205x shorter. Compactness enabler for a tabletop EUV source; photon-generation downstream (L2). 5/5 PASS.

title: H_005 HVM throughput floor вЂ” HVM needs в‰Ґ100 WPH but 6.5 nm at the same source manages only ~11 WPH (1/14 photons, H_002), an order of magnitude below the floor в†’ throughput/economics wall. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” 13.5nm 150 WPH vs 6.5nm 10.6 WPH at same source (floor 100); restoring floor needs ~2366 W (beyond H_001 LPP ceiling). Throughput wall from transcript 100-WPH threshold. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_006 accelerator в†’ EUV photons вЂ” undulator (15mm,K=1) makes 13.5nm at ~0.47 GeV (single-stage LPA reach); inverse-Compton (1Вµm) at ~2 MeV. Closes H_004 e-beamв†’light gap. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” undulator 13.5nm@466.5 MeV (в‰¤1 GeV), inverse-Compton 13.5nm@2.20 MeV; both roundtrip-exact. Accelerator path makes light, not just electrons (fixes H_004 L2). 5/5 PASS.

title: H_007 sub-13.5 nm tunability by electron energy вЂ” same undulator spans 13.5/6.5/5/3 nm at 466/672/766/990 MeV (~2.1Г— dial, all в‰¤1 GeV). Shorter О» = a knob, not an emitter+multilayer swap. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” 13.5в†’3nm = 466.5в†’989.5 MeV (2.12Г— dial, Оі~1/в€љО»), all within single-stage LPA reach. Accelerator source sidesteps the LPP emitter(Snв†’Gd/Lu/La)+multilayer(Mo/Siв†’La/B) double-swap. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_008 accelerator-source flux wall вЂ” at present LPA rep rates the undulator avg in-band EUV power is ~10ВівЂ“10вЃµГ— below the ~167 W for 100 WPH; compact path is flux/average-power limited, not wavelength-limited. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” HVM needs ~167 W; LPA now ~1 mW (gap 1.7e5Г—), pushed 100 kHz ~0.1 W (gap 1667Г—). Real wall is rep-rate/brightness (reopenable horizon), not wavelength. Honest counterweight to H_004/006/007. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_009 beam energy spread в†’ undulator linewidth вЂ” ~1% LPA energy spread gives ~2% О”О»/О», total 2.24% > 2% in-band budget, swamps higher harmonics в†’ erodes in-band flux (compounds H_008). SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” n=1 total 2.24% (natural 1% вЉ• spread 2%) > 2% budget; n=3 natural 0.33% << spread 2%. Beam quality limits in-band fraction (reopenable: staged LPA <0.1%). 5/5 PASS.

title: H_010 synchrotron vs compact LPA вЂ” storage ring meets HVM power but ~4 EUV-tools cost + ~200Г— footprint; LPA inverts it (tiny footprint, flux wall). Accelerator landscape = footprintв†”throughput trade. SUPPORTED 4/4.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” footprint 200Г—, cost 4.3 EUV-tools, synchrotron meets 167 W / LPA doesn't. Neither corner free; design picks which wall to break (shrink ring vs raise LPA flux). 4/4 PASS.

title: H_011 accelerator wavelength reach вЂ” no theoretical short-О» floor; О»~1/EВІ walks EUVв†’water-windowв†’X-ray. Single-stage LPA (в‰¤1 GeV)в†’~3nm, few-stage (в‰¤2 GeV)в†’~1nm. Wall is flux/beam-quality, not wavelength. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” 0.5/1/2/5/10 GeV в†’ 11.75/2.94/0.73/0.12/0.03 nm; 3nm@0.99 GeV, 1nm@1.71 GeV, 0.1nm@5.42 GeV; О»в€ќ1/EВІ exact. No wavelength floor вЂ” real cap is flux(H_008)/beam-quality(H_009). 5/5 PASS.

title: H_A1 cavity-enhanced inverse-Compton + attosecond timing lock вЂ” decouple EUV photon rep-rate from the laser amplifier + lock linewidth в†’ break flux+beam-quality wall from a sub-cm accelerator. Prediction: enhancementв‰Ґ10вЃґ & jitterв‰¤1fs в†’ в‰Ґ167W in-band, О”О»/О»в‰¤1%.
verdict: none вЂ” рџњ‚ abstract conjecture, unverified (no run)

title: H_A2 compact LPA-driven micro-SASE FEL вЂ” exponential photon gain ~100Г—/bunch at the flux-wall root, tabletop. Prediction: SASE saturation в‰¤5m undulator. Threatened by H_009 energy spread.
verdict: none вЂ” рџњ‚ abstract conjecture, unverified (no run)

title: H_A3 recirculating micro-storage + cryo many-period undulator вЂ” multi-turn (Г—N flux) + Nв‰Ґ100 cold periods (narrow line) break flux AND beam-quality together. Prediction: в‰Ґ20 turns & Nв‰Ґ100 в†’ in-band Г—30, О”О»/О»в‰¤1%.
verdict: none вЂ” рџњ‚ abstract conjecture, unverified (no run)

tier: рџњ‚ ABSTRACT в†’ рџџў promoted to H_012
title: H_A4 shot-by-shot spectral gating + grazing-incidence column вЂ” recover in-band flux from imperfect source + cut optics loss; cheapest near-term lever. Prediction: wafer in-band watts в‰Ґ5Г— ungated normal-incidence baseline. Runnable next.
verdict: promoted вЂ” runnable core verified as H_012 (рџџў 8.03Г— recovery, 5/5)

title: H_A5 all-optical EUV (HHGв†’plasma-mirror amplifyв†’metasurface relay) вЂ” delete the accelerator entirely; accelerator-free moonshot. Prediction: end-to-end в‰Ґ10W in-band 13.5nm (HVM-candidacy threshold, ~10вЃґГ— over HHG records).
verdict: none вЂ” рџњ‚ abstract conjecture, unverified (most speculative)

title: H_012 spectral gating + grazing-incidence in-band recovery вЂ” 4/11 surfaces grazing (R=0.9) + gating lifts wafer in-band flux ~8Г— over normal-incidence ungated at 6.5 nm (в‰Ґ5Г— bar). Promotes abstract H_A4. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” recovery 8.03Г— (baseline 9.75e-4 в†’ enhanced 7.83e-3); cheapest, least-exotic flux-wall lever. Recovery not generation (flux H_008 untouched). 5/5 PASS.

tier: рџџў SUPPORTED (numerical В· from meta-law P4)
title: H_013 energy-spread cooling splits the M4 brightness wall вЂ” cooling ПѓОі/Оі 1.0в†’0.85% pushes the line 2.24в†’1.97% (inside 2% budget: quality wall BEATEN) while average power unchanged (flux wall STUBBORN). From abstraction-lane prediction P4. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” quality sub-wall beatable by cooling (non-conservative, Liouville-exempt), flux sub-wall (H_008) terminal. Fleet loop: meta-law M4 в†’ escape E4 в†’ prediction P4 в†’ verified. 5/5 PASS.

tier: рџњ‚ ABSTRACT в†’ рџџў promoted to H_014
title: H_B1 no-SPF narrow-line recovery вЂ” intrinsically narrow source deletes ~25вЂ“30% spectral-purity-filter loss + doubles as actinic inspection. Cheapest near-term in-band recovery. Prediction: в‰Ґ25% delivered in-band recovered.
verdict: promoted вЂ” runnable core verified as H_014 (рџџў 1.43Г— recovery, 5/5)

title: H_B2 high-cross-section ultrathin resist вЂ” 4вЂ“6Г— EUV absorption in в‰¤12 nm MOx/metamaterial film multiplies effective dose (demand side). Prediction: в‰Ґ2Г— effective dose at equal LER.
verdict: none вЂ” рџњ‚ abstract conjecture, unverified (RLS trade is the risk)

title: H_B3 two-color narrow-arm litho вЂ” EUV only arms, cheap flood fires в†’ EUV photon demand в‰¤15вЂ“20%. Prediction: node CD at в‰¤20% single-color EUV dose.
verdict: none вЂ” рџњ‚ abstract conjecture, unverified (armed-state blur is the risk)

tier: рџњ‚ ABSTRACT в†’ рџџў partially promoted (H_017)
title: H_B4 re-invertible high-rep recombination EUV laser вЂ” only intrinsically-narrow, undulator-free source-side escape from the flux wall (sidesteps accelerator, meta-law M2/E2). Prediction: gLв‰Ґ14 at в‰Ґ10 kHz в†’ в‰Ґ10 mW in-band, scaling path to 167 W.
verdict: partially promoted вЂ” geometry/requirement verified as H_017; 13.5nm gain remains the open frontier

title: H_B5 digital photon-counting litho вЂ” Geiger-mode resist + photon-counting metrology converts dose-to-clear into a counting problem. Prediction: print at вџЁ5 photons/pixelвџ©, <1 ppm error, if per-photon gain >10Ві.
verdict: none вЂ” рџњ‚ abstract conjecture, unverified (lateral blur vs gain is the crux)

title: H_014 no-SPF in-band recovery вЂ” narrow source drops the spectral-purity filter a broadband LPP needs в†’ recovers ~43% in-band power; narrow required (broadband exceeds OOB tolerance). Promotes abstract H_B1. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” recovery 1.43Г— (drop 0.70-transmission SPF); narrow can skip SPF, broadband can't. Recovery not generation (H_008 untouched), conditional on H_B4. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_015 wall census вЂ” across 6 sub-13.5nm architectures the binding wall is always one of {M1 photon, M2 power, M3 footprint, M4 flux}, NEVER wavelength (M5 confirmed); accelerator routes bind on M4 (flux). SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” LPPв†’M2, synchrotronв†’M3, LPA-undulator/inverse-Comptonв†’M4, recomb-laserв†’M2, BEUV-opticsв†’M1; 0 bind on wavelength. Flux (M4) is the accelerator-route terminal wall. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_016 ERL reopens the flux floor вЂ” energy recovery lifts rep-rate by 1/(1-О·) with NO thermodynamic cap; ERL+FEL reaches 200W (>167 floor) compact, ERL alone 2W (product wall). Flux is engineering-reopenable, not a 2nd-law ceiling. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” rep-rate ceiling 1e5в†’1e6 (О·0.9, 10Г—)в†’diverges (О·в†’1); ERL+FEL 200W в‰Ґ167, ERL-alone 2W insufficient (necessary not sufficient). Flux REOPENABLE вЂ” terminal question now engineering/economic (compact 167W at affordable wall-plug). 5/5 PASS.

tier: рџџў SUPPORTED (numerical В· reference-matched В· promotes H_B4)
title: H_017 recombination EUV laser saturation requirement вЂ” plasma waveguide makes gLв‰Ґ14 reachable at modest ~1 cmвЃ»В№ gain (reference-matched to 46.9 nm Ar laser); the 13.5 nm gain is the open frontier, not geometry. Promotes H_B4. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” 46.9nm Ar gL=14 anchor, waveguide 140Г— length, required 13.5nm gain 1.0 cmвЃ»В№ (modest). Geometry reachable; 13.5nm gain unverified (honest frontier). 5/5 PASS.

title: H_018 ERL beam-breakup is not the binding wall вЂ” ERL+FEL EUV needs ~0.2 mA, ~100Г— below HOM-damped BBU threshold (~20 mA); binding ERL limit is heat/wall-plug, not instability. SUPPORTED 4/4.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” needed 0.2 mA vs BBU 20 mA (100Г— margin); HOM damping 20Г— lever. Localizes terminal wall to heat/wall-plug+economics (H_016). 4/4 PASS.

title: H_019 cost-of-ownership conjunction вЂ” compact coherent/ERL beats LPP $/wafer-layer ONLY when О·в‰Ґ~4Г— (M6) AND amortized across Mв‰Ґ~3 scanners (M9); neither alone wins; M8 waste-heat OPEX floor never vanishes. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” both-levers 0.55 WIN vs О·-only 1.35 / amort-only 1.00 (both LOSE); Mв†’в€ћ asymptotes to M8 floor 0.15 (never 0). Economics reopenable down to the M8 waste-heat asymptote. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_020 real-units cost-of-ownership вЂ” with public-order figures the energy+waste-heat (M8) term is ~0.5% of LPP cost-of-ownership; binding economic wall is CAPEX+maintenance (M7/M9), NOT the M8 thermodynamic floor. Settles the campaign's last open unknown. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” CAPEX/yr $70M + maint $87.5M vs energy $0.77M в†’ M8=0.48% of CoO, CAPEX+maint=99.5%. M8 floor is real but ~200Г— below LPP all-in cost: NOT the decision wall, CAPEX is. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_021 tabletop accelerator wins the CAPEX wall via the M7 learning curve вЂ” replicable modules cross below LPP tool CAPEX at ~6 units (Wright LR 0.85); monolithic synchrotron stuck at 4Г— (no replication). Revives the compact route. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” compact CAPEX N=1 1.50в†’N=10 0.87в†’N=100 0.51, crossover ~5.6 modules; synchrotron 4.0 never rides the curve. The small replicable tabletop accelerator wins the CAPEX terminal wall. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_022 combination breakthrough вЂ” tabletop accelerator + ERL + FEL + cooling + module-array clears flux (200W) AND CAPEX (0.87<LPP) AND wavelength tunability simultaneously; each lever necessary. Realizes goal 'tabletop accelerator + @ combination'. SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” stack 200Wв‰Ґ167 (flux), 0.87<1.0 (CAPEX), tunable (wavelength) all cleared; drop FELв†’2W or arrayв†’1.5 reopens a wall (each necessary). Compact-accelerator combination breaks every campaign wall at once. 6/6 PASS.

title: H_023 ERLв†”FEL cross-coupling holds but is the combination's tightest link вЂ” cooled 0.85% inside FEL Pierce ПЃ~1% (margin 1.18Г—), post-FEL 1.31% inside ERL acceptance 2% (margin 1.52Г—); FEL beam-quality is the binding coupling. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” both couplings consistent; FEL beam-quality margin 1.18Г— is the binding cross-coupling (ПЃ-conditional, L1). Deeper cooling buys margin; source-coherent @-routes sidestep it. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_024 cooling is the clean lever, raising FEL Pierce ПЃ is a trap вЂ” deeper cooling lifts BOTH FEL+ERL margins; raising ПЃ widens FEL but crushes ERL acceptance <1 (recovery fails) past ПЃв‰€1.8%. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” Пѓ0.5% в†’ FEL 2.0Г—/ERL 1.79Г— (both up); ПЃ2% в†’ FEL 2.35Г—/ERL 0.92Г— (ERL fails), crossover ПЃ=1.81%. The tightest link (H_023) opens by cooling, not ПЃ. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_025 @-family depletion census вЂ” @-combination space mapped & dry: of 4 families exactly 1 clears all walls (accelerator-coherent spine H_022), 3 fall on distinct walls, supply(3)+demand(1) taxonomy complete в†’ DEPLETION. Closes the goal. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” 1 clearer + 3 orthogonal partials (flux/rls/capex-redundant) + complete taxonomy в†’ @-space dry. Goal 'breakthrough + deepen-to-depletion' met; binding work now CAPEX/M7 + cooling stage, not @-search. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_026 sourced re-verification вЂ” published data CONFIRMS core inputs (optics R, LPP 205-250W, ~0.02% wall-plug, $200-400M CAPEX) and CORRECTS 3 optimistic links (La/B 0.58в†’wall ~8Г—; demonstrated 46.9nm gL~8.3<14; raw LPA spread several%). SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” core REAL not fabricated; 3 corrections all make engineering harder not easier; physics-wall conclusions hold. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_027 break integration wall (weakness 1) вЂ” 3 lenses: every subsystem standalone-demonstrated (min TRL 4>1), synchrotron/FEL integration precedent, start-to-end sim в†’ bounded-engineering wall, not invention. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” integration is a TRL/engineering gap (combination TRL~2-3), reopenable; not new physics. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_028 break FEL thin-margin wall (weakness 2) вЂ” 3 independent escapes: coolingв†’2.0Г—, inverse-Compton sidesteps Пѓ<ПЃ entirely, larger ERL acceptance pushes ПЃ-trap crossover 1.81%в†’2.88%. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” thin FEL margin reopenable by 3 independent escapes (widen/remove/relax), not a single fragile path. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_029 break replicable-module wall (weakness 3) вЂ” 3 lenses: ~70% standard mass-produced parts, only ~6 units to beat LPP, fiber-combining drive. Replication risk concentrates on ~30% bespoke. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” the leap of faith is bounded to a minority-of-cost low-volume fiber-based problem (bespoke 30% = the hard part). 5/5 PASS.

tier: рџџў SUPPORTED (numerical В· reference-match В· honesty)
title: H_030 funded-reality reference-match вЂ” accelerator-FEL EUV is real+funded (xLight $40M+CHIPS, KEK 10kW) validating the direction, BUT funded driver = conventional ERL not tabletop LPA, funded leg = M9-amortization not M7-module-array, 13.5nm-on-LPA + single-pass cooling undemonstrated, concept predates lumen (Nakajima 2014). SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” direction validated by industry money; 3 honest corrections (driver/econ-leg/wavelength+cooling) + not novel. Robust restatement is xLight-shaped (shared ERL amortized across scanners), not tabletop-LPA-shaped. 6/6 PASS.

title: H_031 fleet-r2 вЂ” binding FEL constraint is SLICE spread not undulator length (dechirpв‰ cooling; 0.5% slice ~5Г— over Ming-Xie в†’ no 13.5nm lasing, floor ~24.8nm, TGU=named unverified escape); H_021 FEL<LPP holds only at fan-out Nв‰Ґ2 (~8Г— @N=10, inverts @N=1), cryomodule Wright shallow 0.95 в†’ M9 not M7. SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” wavelength dial bounded by slice spread (cooling undemonstrated, dechirp insufficient); CAPEX win real only amortized (M9). 6/6 PASS.

title: H_032 TGU escape classified вЂ” the last orthogonal escape (transverse-gradient undulator) is insufficient for LPA (never lased anywhere; dispersion breaks LPA emittance past 13.5nm matching; LWFA-FEL floor 275nm), so the slice-spread wall STANDS for tabletop-LPA but is CLEARED by the funded conventional ERL (FLASH 13nm 2006) = architecture wall not physics ceiling. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” TGU can't rescue LPA at 13.5nm; answer is the shared conventional-ERL FEL, not the tabletop LPA. Campaign converged. 5/5 PASS.

title: H_033 BREAKTHROUGH вЂ” the slice-spread wall is FEL-gain-specific; inverse-Compton (ICS) is the orthogonal gain-free mechanism immune to it, reaching 13.5nm with only ~2.2 MeV (~455Г— less than an undulator FEL), slice spread only broadens the line to ~1% (within 2% passband). Compact 13.5nm reopens; wall relocates to flux (reopenable H_016). SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” slice-spread wall broken for the compact-source question via ICS (no gain condition, ~2 MeV, tabletop); honest residual = the relocated flux wall, undemonstrated at litho power. 6/6 PASS.

title: H_034 deepen вЂ” the ICS residual flux wall (~7e5Г— short of 100W litho target) is reopenable in principle by recirculation (optical cavity 1e4 Г— ERL 1e3 = 1e7 > gap, ~15Г— margin), same family as H_016; honest residual: litho-power ICS-EUV undemonstrated, needs near-maximal cavity AND ERL together. SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” ICS flux wall classified reopenable (recirc 1e7 > 7e5 gap) but thin 15Г— margin + undemonstrated at EUV; simultaneity is the next front. 6/6 PASS.

tier: рџџў SUPPORTED (numerical В· loop cycle-2 лЏЊнЊЊ)
title: H_035 cycle-2 breakthrough вЂ” the ICS enhancement cavity is at the IR DRIVE wavelength (finesse 1e4-1e5 routine), not at EUV (R~0.70 -> finesse ~9, forbidden); so the H_034 flux-recirculation gain rests on demonstrated IR-cavity tech (margin robust). Honest residual: integrated high-avg-power EUV-ICS undemonstrated. SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” 'EUV cavity impossible' is a misclassification; cavity is at IR. Margin robust. 6/6 PASS.

tier: рџџў SUPPORTED (numerical В· loop cycle-2 м‹¬н™” В· honest negative)
title: H_036 cycle-2 deepen (honest negative) вЂ” the ICS flux margin does NOT survive bandwidth-collection derating (~50x eats the H_034 15x margin -> 0.3x LOST); recoverable only by stacking demonstrated headroom (finesse x10 AND ERL current x10 = x100 -> ~30x), both-maxed-at-EUV undemonstrated. Compact-ICS is possible but margin-thin. SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” bandwidth-limited collection eats the margin; reopens only by stacked maxima -> margin-thin, reinforces conventional-ERL as the funded answer. 6/6 PASS.

title: H_037 cycle-3 breakthrough attempt FALSIFIED вЂ” a high-brightness beam does NOT beat the ICS bandwidth-collection derating: lambda(theta)=l0(1+gamma^2 theta^2) is radiation kinematics, off-axis photons out-of-band regardless of beam (recovery 1.0x) -> the ~50x derating is a FUNDAMENTAL ICS tax. Honest negative.
verdict: рџ”ґ FALSIFIED (honest) вЂ” F-HB-1 triggered; the brightness escape does not exist, the derating is fundamental. Feeds H_038 convergence.

title: H_038 loop CONVERGENCE вЂ” 3 orthogonal supply-side radiation families classified (FEL slice-spread-bound->ERL; ICS/gain-free terminal-thin via fundamental bandwidth tax no beam lever beats H_037; recombination harder); all route back to conventional-ERL-class beam+recirc -> break-walls dry, loop converges: robust answer = conventional ERL FEL (H_030), compact coherent EUV terminal-thin. SUPPORTED 5/5.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” breakв†’verifyв†’deepen loop converges; compact coherent EUV terminal-thin, ERL is the robust litho-power answer. 5/5 PASS.

tier: рџџў SUPPORTED (numerical В· generalization В· M10)
title: H_039 generalize вЂ” one accelerator+undulator/ICS spans THz(3.4MeV)->far-IR(11MeV)->EUV(511MeV)->water-window(1.08GeV)->hard-X(5.94GeV) by the О»в€ќ1/ОіВІ dial, 6.5 orders of magnitude; no-stable-emitter bands (THz/EUV/water-window/hard-X) = the engine's no-incumbent market (M10); the dial-free/flux-wall/conventional-form-robust structure recurs at every rung. SUPPORTED 6/6.
verdict: рџџў SUPPORTED вЂ” EUV is the 511 MeV rung, not the boundary; the verified machinery generalizes across the spectrum, market = no-emitter bands (M10). 6/6 PASS.

title: H_040 band verdict census вЂ” the EUV 'compact terminal-thin' verdict does NOT generalize; it is REQUIREMENT-driven (litho's extreme ~100W flux, not 13.5nm). EUV-litho is the outlier; compact WINS at THz (low-E, slice-spread irrelevant), WORKS at water window, EXISTS today at hard X-ray (Lyncean) & nuclear gamma (HIGS/ELI).
